question: Bitcoin price range on Apr 8, 2026?
reasoning: Based on current Bitcoin prices around $68,300-$68,900, reaching the target range of $73,500-$73,749.99 within approximately 32 hours requires a significant price movement of about 7-8%. While Bitcoin has shown volatility and briefly touched $70,000 recently amid geopolitical developments, sustaining a move to the narrow $73.5K-$73.75K band is challenging given current market conditions and range-bound trading patterns. The 60-second average requirement for BRTI at 5 PM EDT creates additional precision requirements.
key_factors: <cite index="4-1,4-5">Bitcoin briefly touched $70,000 on ceasefire reports but showed hesitation</cite>
<cite index="5-2,5-7">Bitcoin has been range-bound between $62,000-$75,000 for two months</cite>
<cite index="11-1,11-2">BRTI calculates Bitcoin price every second from major exchanges</cite>
<cite index="5-5">High oil prices at $107/barrel and Iran tensions creating headwinds</cite>
risks: Requires 7-8% price increase in ~32 hours to reach target range
Narrow $250 price band creates precision challenge for 60-second average
Current range-bound market conditions limit upside momentum
Geopolitical tensions and macro headwinds may cap rallies
Market showing mixed signals with strong sell technical indicators
